title: February 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}
'''February 27''' is the 58th day of the year. There are 307 days remaining (308 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[David Sherman]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 105|''Star Wars Weekly'' 105]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 2|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 2]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 52|''Star Wars Insider'' 52]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 1|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 1]] published.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 9|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 9]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Darth Who Contest]] voting ends.
*2007 – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy (2006) 20|''Legacy'' (2006) 20]] published.
*2008 – [[Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope (PhotoComic)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'' PhotoComic]] published.
*[[2009]] – "[[Storm Over Ryloth]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2009 – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 1: Treaty of Coruscant]]'' webcomic begins publishing.
*[[2013]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 5|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 5]] published.
*2013 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan 3|''Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan'' 3]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Aaron Allston]] dies.
*[[2019]] – [[Anakin Skywalker]] and more [[Clone trooper]] skins added to [[Star Wars Battlefront II]].
*2019 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 29|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 29]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Michael Culver]] dies.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 1]]'' reprinted.
<noinclude>
